历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 986 → 1031 → 978 → 1288. In 2024, the ranking shifted back by about 310 places compared to 2023, with fluctuations becoming more pronounced in recent two years. For 2025 physics category admissions, the 2024 ranking of 1288 is used as a baseline reference. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 4 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 6 in 2023, and 5 in 2024, showing minor fluctuations between 4 and 6 in recent years. The 2026 enrollment plan documents have not yet been filed; they are treated as unchanged and not included in expansion or contraction judgments.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 19th (13th in 2021 → 17th in 2022 → 19th in 2023 → 19th in 2024 → 19th in 2025 → 19th in 2026), consistently in the Top 20 in recent years, making it a top-tier normal comprehensive university in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion incidents, and the school management responds promptly. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and stable application attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, a significant ranking drop occurred in Jiangxi Province in 2022, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Gansu Province. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 18 disciplines were rated A- or above, including 6 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, and Marxist Theory), 6 A disciplines (Physical Education, Foreign Languages and Literature, Mathematics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Ecology, and Statistics), and 6 A- disciplines (Chemistry, Philosophy, Law, Physics, Theoretical Economics, and Systems Science). The disciplinary strength is extremely outstanding, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Basic science majors such as Mathematics (A) and Physics (A-) are socially popular with broad employment prospects. The estimated number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 146,000, an increase of about 24,000 (approximately 19.9%) compared to 121,000 in 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing and is a nationally enrolling institution, with a small enrollment plan in Gansu Province (4–6 in recent years) and no significant regional preference. Candidates from Gansu Province have a strong willingness to study in Beijing, and Beijing's location advantage adds some positive points to applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of ranking decline in 2024, the significant increase in physics category candidates in the province in 2026 (+19.9%), the unchanged enrollment plan, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates due to the school's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, competition is expected to intensify further in 2026 compared to 2025. The minimum admission ranking is predicted to continue declining from the 2024 baseline of 1288. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1318, with a range of 1168–1468.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1168–1468, it is recommended to target Mathematics and Applied Mathematics as the primary goal (Tier 1), with Physics as a safe choice (Tier 2). If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1168), one can fully aim for the Mathematics major. If the ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>1468), caution is advised.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 101 → 107 → 96 → 138 → 125, fluctuating within the 96–138 range. In 2024, it shifted back to 138, and in 2025, it rebounded to 125. Over the past two years, the fluctuation range was about 13–42 positions, showing a volatile pattern. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 2 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 1 in 2025, with significant annual fluctuations. The 2026 enrollment plan document has not yet been entered; it is treated as unchanged and not included in expansion/reduction judgments.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, and is the highest institution in the domestic normal education category. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with above-average application attention. In 2022, Jiangxi Province experienced a significant drop in admission rankings, but this was an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Gansu Province. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ disciplines directly related to the liberal arts group: Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Education, Psychology, and Marxist Theory; A disciplines include Foreign Languages and Literature; A- disciplines include Philosophy, Law, and Theoretical Economics. The liberal arts foundation is extremely deep, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature A+) has a relatively hot social popularity, and the publicly-funded normal student policy continues to attract attention. The estimated number of history category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 73,000, an increase of about 15,000 (approximately 25.1%) compared to 58,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a nationally enrolling university, with very few liberal arts enrollment plans in Gansu Province (1–5 in recent years), leading to highly concentrated competition. Beijing's regional advantages strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of the ranking to 125 in 2025, a significant increase in history category candidates in the province in 2026 (+25.1%), very few and volatile enrollment plans, and the university's top-tier liberal arts strength continuously attracting high-scoring candidates, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with the minimum admission ranking slightly shifting back from 125. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 140, with a range of 90–190.
